hooks.prompt: You just exited plan mode. If there is an active Syntaur assignment (check for a workspace field in assignment.md), pick the next unused `plan-v<N>.md` filename (or `plan.md` if no plan*.md exists yet) under the assignment dir, write the plan you just created there, and append a `- [ ] Execute [plan](./plan.md)` (or versioned equivalent, e.g. `- [ ] Execute [plan v2](./plan-v2.md)`) entry to the `## Todos` section of assignment.md — marking any prior active plan todo as superseded (`- [x] ~~...~~ (superseded by plan-v<N>)`). Never delete superseded todos.
